title: Route by CAPABILITY not tool name, support all standard agentic tools across all CLIs
observed: grep and codesearch aliases can route to web_search
glob, list, todo, and subagent tools are advertised but never called
tool argument keys vary by client schema
expected: A data-driven capability registry, schema-projected arguments, specialized-tool precedence, shell fallback, the full shared capability set, and multilingual tests.
